fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the sales order line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item in the sales order line.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Available
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the actual items are available.

fields.name: Planning Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planning status of the production order, depending on the actual sales order.

fields.name: Needs Replanning
fields.tooltip: Specifies if it is necessary or not to reschedule this line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Planned Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity planned in this line.
